title: Desktop view on Android (for tablets)
excerpt:

posts.author: Workboard (Workboard)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, we use several android tablets to update the boards on Monday.com. Previously we were using the desktop view because the mobile app does not show the conditional coloring.

The text on the mobile app is also very small. Recently, we have been unable to use the desktop version on the android tablets and it forces us to the app. I have selected the “Desktop Site” option in the browser.

I would greatly appreciate an option or a revert back to the state where I can pull the desktop version of Monday.com on an Android tablet.

posts.author: hkjohn (jawn)
posts.cookedHtml: This is also a huge problem for us right now - we have Android tablets and Monday is trying to force us to use the HORRIBLE app as opposed to the browser version

posts.author: mendina24 (Christian Gilvin Mendina)
posts.cookedHtml: Have anyone found a solution for this? The app is just horrible to use.
